description_long: This object is a classic-style rifle featuring a wooden fixed stock and a long, slender metal barrel. The receiver and barrel assembly are metallic, with a detachable box magazine inserted at an angle above the trigger guard. The rifle is equipped with a bayonet affixed to the muzzle, extending its length and giving it a military appearance. The sighting system appears to be simple iron sights, with no optical or electronic enhancements visible. The overall finish is a combination of dark brown wood and matte gray metal, with a utilitarian and robust design suitable for field use.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden fixed stock, long metal barrel, angled box magazine, and attached bayonet, finished in brown and gray.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, angled magazine, and bayonet.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow profile, magazine protrusion, and alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's stock, magazine, and bayonet from the other side.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the slimness of the barrel and stock, with the bayonet extending forward.
